items.name: Stephen Attenborough
items.title: Virgin Galactic founding employee, former Commercial Director & Chief Customer Officer; Virgin Unite trustee & Board Director
items.quoteBefore: “Our ambition for partnerships at Virgin Galactic was simple — we wanted to work with a brand that shared our DNA for exploration and
items.quoteAfter: . Laura Wood was the driving force that made that vision a reality in the partnership between Virgin Galactic and Jaguar Land Rover.”
paragraphs: “Our ambition for partnerships at Virgin Galactic was simple — we wanted it to go further than a sponsorship; we wanted to work with a brand that shared our DNA for exploration and pioneering spirit. Laura Wood was the driving force that made that vision a reality in the partnership between Virgin Galactic and Jaguar Land Rover.

Working with Laura was a masterclass in how to manage a partnership of this scale. She was responsible for weaving Land Rover into the very fabric of our operations — from the fleet of vehicles that towed our spaceships to the runway, to the high-stakes activations that brought our future astronauts together. She never saw it as a simple branding exercise; she understood that every touchpoint had to feel authentic to the mission.

What sets Laura apart is her ability to navigate the complexities of two massive global brands while never losing sight of the creative goal. She is incredibly sharp, operationally fearless, and has an innate sense of how to tell a story that resonates globally.

Laura is one of those rare leaders who can handle the minute details of a technical integration one moment and the strategic demands of a world-first launch the next, all while keeping her team focused and inspired. It was a privilege to have her at the helm during such a defining chapter for the world’s first commercial spaceline.”

items.name: Stephanie Wenborn
items.title: Head of Marketing & Partnerships, EON
items.quoteBefore: “Trust and shared vision are the bedrock of any great partnership. Our history with Laura spans three Bond films — Skyfall, Spectre and No Time To Die — and that track record made Beyond The Badge the obvious choice for our current and future projects at EON. Laura has an incredible intuition for connecting the right brands with the right
paragraphs: “Trust and shared vision are the bedrock of any great partnership. Our history with Laura spans three Bond films (Skyfall, Spectre and No Time To Die), and that track record made Beyond The Badge the obvious choice for our current and future projects at EON.
Laura has an incredible intuition for connecting the right brands with the right cultural moments and we’re excited to keep building on this legacy together.”
items.campaignVideoLabel: Play EON Bond film campaign video

items.name: Dominic Reid OBE
items.title: Formerly Founding CEO of the Invictus Games
items.quoteBefore: “Laura has an intelligent and imaginative grasp of the way brands can work with properties that they sponsor to their mutual benefit. She was instrumental in the successful
items.quoteAfter: between Jaguar Land Rover and the Invictus Games. And she brought to bear her creativity and incisiveness to address challenges and deliver better and better solutions. In addition to this, she is a delight to work with.”
paragraphs: “Laura has an intelligent and imaginative grasp of the way brands can work with properties that they sponsor to their mutual benefit.

She was instrumental in the successful partnership between Jaguar Land Rover and the Invictus Games. And she brought to bear her creativity and incisiveness to address challenges and deliver better and better solutions. In addition to this, she is a delight to work with.”

items.name: Niamh Bryne
items.title: Artist Manager — Gorillaz, Founder Eleven Management & MMF Chair
items.quoteBefore: “When we first sat down with Laura Wood and her team at Jaguar Land Rover, we knew we weren’t looking at a standard corporate partnership. Laura didn’t just want a logo on a car; she had the vision to treat our Gorillaz fanbase as a
paragraphs: “When we first sat down with Laura Wood and her team at Jaguar Land Rover, we weren’t looking at a standard corporate partnership. Laura didn’t just want a logo on a car; she had the vision to treat our Gorillaz fanbase as a community of untapped talent.

With a brief to promote the brand new Jaguar Formula E Race team — to plug a vital skills gap and find the next generation of world-class software engineers — we had to access that community where they were in culture.
Together, we created a high-stakes code-cracking challenge within Noodle’s virtual garage in the Gorillaz app, turning addressing a vital skills gap into a progressive, immersive gaming experience.

400,000 app downloads, 41,000 entries, 500 code crackers and a team of next-gen cyber engineers recruited — the results speak to her ability to lead complex, multi-faceted projects across global brands.
Beyond the metrics, Laura’s leadership ensured that the creative integrity of the Gorillaz universe remained intact while successfully launching the Jaguar Formula E Race team into a new era.

Laura didn’t just fill a recruitment quota; she created a blueprint for how brands should engage with the future of tech. It was a rare, progressive and exciting venture that wouldn’t have happened without her drive.”
items.campaignVideoLabel: Play Gorillaz × Jaguar Land Rover campaign video

items.name: David Gandy
items.title: Model & Entrepreneur
items.quoteBefore: “I have had the pleasure of working with Laura for over 15 years on high-profile events, activations, and partnerships. Throughout this time, I cannot speak highly enough about her unwavering commitment, dedication, and exceptional problem-solving skills. She is never shy of thinking outside the box, and her dynamic, innovative approach has been instrumental in driving the huge successes achieved with the brands she has worked with.”
paragraphs: “I have had the pleasure of working with Laura for over 15 years on high-profile events, activations, and partnerships. Throughout this time, I cannot speak highly enough about her unwavering commitment, dedication, and exceptional problem-solving skills. She is never shy of thinking outside the box, and her dynamic, innovative approach has been instrumental in driving the huge successes achieved with the brands she has worked with.

On a personal level, Laura is one of the kindest, most thoughtful, and considerate people I have ever had the pleasure to meet and work with. Her professionalism combined with her genuine kindness makes her an invaluable partner in any project.”

items.name: Paul Amadi MBE
items.title: Marketing Consultant (former British Red Cross Executive Director of Marketing, Fundraising and Communications)
items.quoteBefore: “Working with Laura on the Jaguar Land Rover — British Red Cross partnership was an 8-year demonstration of strategic insight, dynamism, and an exemplary commitment to
paragraphs: “Working with Laura on the Jaguar Land Rover — British Red Cross charity brand partnership was an 8-year demonstration of strategic insight, dynamism, an exemplary commitment to partnership working and the recognition of the importance of value alignment, all of which (and more) Laura provided on a daily basis.
A key driver to her success was that Laura always saw herself as the custodian of a long-established partnership which had the capability to achieve increasing cut through.

As the brand lead for the British Red Cross, our joint strategic challenge was to evolve a 70-year partnership and take it from an established alliance into something progressive and modern — a genuine engine for driving real humanitarian impact.
Laura’s input transformed what could be characterised as a disparate partnership into something which focused on the one area where we could truly make an impact: Disaster Relief.

The defining element of disaster relief is the ability to move at pace, creating immediate impact. One of the many successes enabled by Laura’s leadership was the mobilisation of a fleet of brand-new Defenders to work on the front line of the British Red Cross’s Covid response.

Underpinning all of the strategic and evidence-based insight Laura provided was a manifest commitment to the values of the British Red Cross, successfully combined with the need to drive purpose visibility for Jaguar Land Rover customers and employees.”
items.campaignVideoLabel: Play Jaguar Land Rover — British Red Cross campaign video

items.name: Dave Benett
items.title: Photographer (Getty Images / London Evening Standard)
items.quoteBefore: “In my line of work, you see a lot of people who try to ‘manage’ the room, but Laura Wood is one of the rare few who actually understands the energy of it. Simply put, Laura curates cultural moments that
paragraphs: “In my line of work, you see a lot of people who try to ‘manage’ the room, but Laura Wood is one of the rare few who actually understands the energy of it. We’ve worked together across countless high-profile events and launches over two incredible decades — from cutting her teeth with her agency Golden Goose PR to becoming a globally respected director at Jaguar Land Rover.

Laura has that rare combination of professional steel and genuine warmth. She understands that the perfect shot isn’t just about the person in front of the lens; it’s about the atmosphere, the timing, and the narrative she’s spent months building behind the scenes.

Simply put, Laura curates cultural moments that matter. Her ability to handle big personalities and even bigger brand expectations with such grace is why she’s so respected in this industry. Whenever Laura is running the show, you just know the end result is going to look world-class and, more importantly, people are actually going to be talking about it. She’s a class act, sharp, professional, and someone who genuinely understands the intersection of brand and culture.”

items.name: Alan Gilpin
items.title: CEO, World Rugby
items.quoteBefore: “Across four Rugby World Cups, Laura and her team were one of the most thoughtful partners we’ve ever worked with at World Rugby. Her ambition for the Defender programme
items.quoteAfter: . She wanted the sponsorship to reach audiences rugby has historically struggled to speak to.”
paragraphs: “Across four Rugby World Cups, Laura and her team were one of the most thoughtful partners we’ve ever worked with at World Rugby. Her ambition for the Defender programme went well beyond logo placement. She wanted the sponsorship to reach audiences rugby has historically struggled to speak to, young fans, communities under-represented in our crowds, and players with disabilities.

Laura and her team delivered on it and more. The work we did together helped change who pictured themselves inside the sport, and raised the bar for what a mainstream partnership in rugby could look like.
That instinct for making a partnership matter is rare. Beyond The Badge is in extremely good hands with her at the helm.”
items.campaignVideoLabel: Play World Rugby Defender campaign video
